name: 43_Social_Network_Analysis_GCN_Cora_ML
query: Habari! Unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mfumo wa uchambuzi wa mtandao wa kijamii kwa kutumia modeli ya GCN na seti ya data ya mtandao wa nukuu wa Cora? Kwanza, hebu tuweke na kusindika seti ya data, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tumia modeli ya GCN kuainisha nodi na rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa ili kupata matokeo bora katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi modeli chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Ukishafanya hivyo, tafadhali hifadhi utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`. Onyesha muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`. Mwisho, unda grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana kwa kutumia D3.js au Bokeh ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`. Itakuwa nzuri pia ikiwa utekelezaji wako unaweza kumruhusu programu kubadilisha kwa urahisi kwenye seti nyingine za data za nukuu. Asante sana kwa msaada wako!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.
Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.
Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.
Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza nodi za kibinafsi na uainishaji wao kwa njia ya nguvu.
Uonyeshaji wa mtandao wa nukuu unapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya madarasa tofauti ya nodi na mahusiano.
Mfumo unapaswa kubuniwa kushughulikia seti za data za nukuu za ziada kwa marekebisho madogo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder. It contains a dummy `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary and does not actually load the Cora citation network dataset. The file contains requirement descriptions and keywords but no real implementation for loading the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal semantic placeholder implementation for benchmark judging. It defines a `build_transforms()` function that returns a list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, but this is explicitly a placeholder for evidence and does not contain any actual data preprocessing logic. There is no code that performs normalization, denoising, or any other substantive preprocessing on the Cora citation network dataset. The file's content and the lack of relevant execution steps in the trajectory evidence confirm that the requirement for data preprocessing is not implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/train.py` file contains a minimal semantic implementation with a dummy training loop (`train(num_steps: int = 5)`) that does not implement a GCN model, does not accept hyperparameters like learning rate or hidden layer size as arguments, and does not perform any actual model optimization. The function `train()` simply sums integers in a loop. There is no evidence of hyperparameter tuning or model optimization as required. The environment feedback mentions command-line arguments were used, but the code itself does not process or utilize them for tuning.

<SATISFIED>
The project structure explicitly includes a `models/saved_models` directory, and the trajectory evidence confirms that operations related to this directory (saving and loading models) completed successfully without any reported errors or system warnings. The environment feedback indicates the saving operation was fully completed and no issues were detected that would affect the functionality of the saved files.

judge_stats.criteria: Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The file `node_classification_results.txt` contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates that actual node classification performance metrics (such as accuracy, precision, recall, or F1-score) were not properly saved. The requirement is for node classification performance to be saved, but the file does not contain meaningful evaluation results.

judge_stats.criteria: Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file `citation_network_visualization.png`. The error message states "No endpoints found that support image input" and a 404 code, indicating the file either does not exist in the expected location or cannot be accessed/read. The trajectory evidence mentions the file was saved without reported errors, but the direct file read attempt failed, which means the visualization's existence and accessibility cannot be confirmed as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies creating an interactive network visualization using D3.js or Bokeh in `results/figures/`. The provided code evidence shows only a minimal placeholder implementation that creates a PNG file (`citation_network_visualization.png`) with text content, not an actual interactive visualization. While trajectory evidence mentions successful execution of `interactive_d3.js` and `network_visualization.py` (Bokeh), the actual workspace files examined (`data_loader.py` and `train.py`) do not contain any D3.js or Bokeh visualization code. The generated PNG file is a static image, not an interactive HTML/JS visualization as required.
